expectations.text: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag

expectations.evidence: OrbitControls.js loaded from CDN; new THREE.OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement) present

expectations.text: Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
expectations.evidence: #canvas-panel on left and #controls-panel on right found in HTML

expectations.text: Right panel has controls to select shape type (cube/sphere/torus)
expectations.evidence: shape-btn elements for multiple shapes including cube, sphere, torus found

expectations.text: Right panel has a color control (input or picker)
expectations.evidence: color-swatch and color-row elements with color inputs found

expectations.text: Right panel has a size/scale control
expectations.evidence: Multiple range inputs found including scale/size controls

expectations.text: Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
